titles.title: Let There Be Love Shared Among Us

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Let there be love shared among us. Let there be love in our eyes. May now your love sweep this nation. Cause us, o Lord to arise. Give us a fresh understanding of brotherly love that is real. Let there be love shared among us Let there be love.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Let there be your life among us Let there be Christ in our eyes. May now your life fill this nation. Cause us, o Lord to arise. Give us a fresh understanding of living in Christ Jesus name. Live your life, Christ, here among us Forever the same.
